intro: Motes of soft light drift between the crystals, and a gentle presence makes itself felt. A fairy regards your team kindly and offers a blessing, freely given.
title: The Fairy's Boon
description: A benevolent fairy offers your team a blessing with no strings attached. Accept it to carry a lasting Relic for the rest of your run, or politely decline.

1.label: Accept the blessing
1.tooltip: (+) Receive a random Formation / buff Relic
1.selected: The fairy's light settles over your team, leaving a gift behind...

2.label: Decline politely
2.selected: You bow your thanks and leave the blessing untaken.
